summary: ORBITAL Trading Platform - Complete end-to-end testing passed. All backend APIs (14/14 tests) and all frontend features working correctly. Login with slide-to-verify bypass (double-click) successful. Dashboard fully functional with AI predictions, live prices, chart timeframes, indicators, and trading.

issues: Minor: Active trades table shows 'No active trades' immediately after trades are placed if they already expired (30s trades)

backend: Assets - /api/assets returns forex, crypto, metals categories
Prices - /api/prices returns live prices for all 3 categories
AI Prediction - /api/predict returns buy_confidence, sell_confidence, reasoning
AI Chat - /api/chat responds with AI-generated content
frontend: Start Trading navigation to auth page
Login form with slide-to-verify (double-click bypass works)
Scrolling price ticker at top shows all assets
Category tabs (FOREX, CRYPTO, METALS) clickable and switch asset list
Chart timeframes (1s, 5s, 1m, 5m, 15m, 1H) clickable and change chart
Indicators button opens dropdown with SMA 20, EMA 9, Bollinger
Clicking indicator adds overlay to chart
BUY button shows AI prediction percentage (e.g., 52%)
SELL button shows AI prediction percentage (e.g., 48%)
Active trades table shows open trades
Countdown timer visible in trades table
AI Chat widget opens and responds to messages
Balance display in header updated after trades

critical_code_review_comments: Code quality is good - proper separation of concerns
AI predictions using Emergent LLM GPT-5.2 integration working correctly
Live metal prices above $4818 requirement met (gold at $5004+)
All requested features implemented and functional
seed_data_creation: Using pre-seeded admin and master user accounts
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features are working. Login requires: 1) Fill email/password, 2) Double-click [data-testid='slide-verify'], 3) Click 'Access Platform'. Dashboard has data-testid attributes for all interactive elements. AI predictions update every 8 seconds.

mocked_apis.note: Precious metals use cached realistic prices with live API overlay from fawazahmed0 currency API. Crypto uses CoinGecko with caching. Payment gateways (Stripe, PayPal, Crypto) are placeholders.

feature_verification.ai_predictions_on_buttons: VERIFIED - BUY/SELL buttons show AI-powered prediction percentages
feature_verification.dynamic_dashboard: VERIFIED - Interactive chart with real-time updates
feature_verification.clickable_indicators: VERIFIED - SMA 20, EMA 9, Bollinger Bands dropdown working
